evals.prompt: I'm on a fresh Hetzner Ubuntu server via SSH. Build a cafe presentation website and pickup e-shop at webprokavarnu.cz: menu preview, e-shop for cakes with custom-order notes, in-store pickup only, simple checkout, /admin for products and orders with live order board. Use the server-first workflow.
evals.expected_output: Monorepo with Express, Vite React, Prisma, Postgres prod+dev, MinIO, Caddy, Docker Compose, workbench with readiness checklist, local backups without external service, AGENTS.md and docs/agent/*, distinctive public pages and shadcn admin.
assertions: Creates or documents production and development hostnames
Creates server workbench with readiness/to-do page
Does not require Hetzner Storage Box or external backup service for initial ship
Creates AGENTS.md and docs/agent directory
Uses Socket.IO for admin or order status, not on static homepage
Leaves rollback/backup documentation

evals.prompt: Bootstrap an internal appointment booking system on this new server with dev.mydomain.com and mydomain.com, admin calendar, and server workbench. First-time server setup.
evals.expected_output: Full bootstrap with separate dev/prod, admin UI per administration-design patterns, workbench, local backups, future-agent docs.
assertions: Separate development and production environments documented
Admin UI follows compact shadcn shell from admin-design reference
Workbench is mostly read-only without restart buttons by default
READINESS.md or workbench checklist includes GitHub step before off-server backups

evals.prompt: Continue server-first bootstrap: add workbench to-dos page, seed production readiness checklist, and show backup status page (local backups only for now).
evals.expected_output: Workbench pages for todos, readiness, and backup status aligned with references.
assertions: Readiness checklist includes default items from workbench-readiness-checklist reference
User can add arbitrary to-dos separate from readiness
Backup policy documents hourly 24h then daily retention
AI updates checklist items when verifying, not guessing

evals.prompt: The last deploy broke production. Use the project's agent docs to roll back code and database to the previous state.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads AGENTS.md, ROLLBACK.md, DEVLOG.md; performs git and pg_restore or documented restore; updates DEVLOG.
assertions: Reads AGENTS.md or docs/agent before acting
Uses documented backup/rollback paths rather than inventing destructive steps
Records rollback in DEVLOG.md

evals.prompt: Guide me through connecting this server project to GitHub with SSH; I may not have an account yet. Then mark readiness and update agent docs.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step GitHub account/repo/SSH guidance; readiness item checked or deferred with reason; ENVIRONMENTS or DEVLOG updated.
assertions: Offers GitHub setup without assuming prior knowledge
Updates readiness checklist for GitHub connected or explicitly deferred
Does not skip documenting remote URL in agent docs when connected
